title: useResizeObserver
description: Watches for size changes in a DOM element using the ResizeObserver API.
summary: Observes element resizing and updates on change.

body.raw:
## API References

- [`mdn`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/ResizeObserver)

ResizeObserver is an API that allows us to detect changes in the size of elements and act accordingly.

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.

You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.`}),`
`,(0,n.jsx)(t,{name:"use-resize-observer",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
\r
type ObserverRect = Omit<DOMRectReadOnly, "toJSON">;\r
\r
const defaultState: ObserverRect = {\r
  x: 0,\r
  y: 0,\r
  width: 0,\r
  height: 0,\r
  top: 0,\r
  left: 0,\r
  bottom: 0,\r
  right: 0\r
};\r
\r
export function useResizeObserver<T extends HTMLElement = any>() {\r
  const frameID = useRef(0);\r
  const ref = useRef<T>(null);\r
\r
  const [rect, setRect] = useState<ObserverRect>(defaultState);\r
\r
  const observer = useMemo(\r
    () =>\r
      typeof window !== "undefined"\r
        ? new ResizeObserver((entries: any) => {\r
            const entry = entries[0];\r
\r
            if (entry) {\r
              cancelAnimationFrame(frameID.current);\r
\r
              frameID.current = requestAnimationFrame(() => {\r
                if (ref.current) {\r
                  setRect(entry.contentRect);\r
                }\r
              });\r
            }\r
          })\r
        : null,\r
    []\r
  );\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if (ref.current) {\r
      observer?.observe(ref.current);\r
    }\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      observer?.disconnect();\r
\r
      if (frameID.current) {\r
        cancelAnimationFrame(frameID.current);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [ref, observer]);\r
\r
  return [ref, rect] as const;\r
}\r
\r
export function useElementSize<T extends HTMLElement = any>() {\r
  const [ref, { width, height }] = useResizeObserver<T>();\r
  return { ref, width, height };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-resize-observer.ts"})]})}function u(r={}){let{wrapper:e}=r.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...r,children:(0,n.jsx)(d,{...r})}):d(r)}function y(r,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return w(k);})();
